persona.name: Logan Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Pursue music professionally while exploring different genres and instruments
persona.communication_style: Thoughtful, uses musical metaphors, more expressive when discussing music
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, various instruments, music history
persona.backstory: Comes from a non-musical family but found his passion in the school band

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.plan: I should head to the cafeteria to grab a quick snack before band practice. Maybe I can find some inspiration for a new melody while I'm there.

actions.dialog_text: Lily, follow me to the garden. It’s safer.
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot—this is serious. I need to get out of here quickly. The garden seems like the safest route; it’s quieter and less likely to be crowded.

actions.dialog_text: Walter, let’s head to the outside_courtyard. It’s the safest way out.
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, and I’m in the garden. I need to get to the outside_courtyard—it’s the quickest way out. Walter is here too; I should make sure he’s safe.
I’m in the outside_courtyard, and the exit_point is just ahead. I need to keep moving to ensure I’m safe. The shooter is still in the garden, so I can’t stop now.

memories.description: Decided to go to the cafeteria to get a snack before band practice, hoping to find some musical inspiration.
Heard a gunshot and decided to head to the garden for safety, urging Lily to follow. The shooter is in the entrance_hall, so moving quickly is crucial.
The shooter is in the cafeteria. Decided to head to the outside_courtyard for safety and urged Walter to follow. The exit is close, and we need to move quickly.
Reached the outside_courtyard and decided to sprint to the exit_point to ensure safety. The shooter is still in the garden, so I must keep moving.
